mapper.select:
SELECT S.JOB_ID , S.JOB_CD , S.JOB_NM , S.JOB_SCHEDULE , S.JOB_METHOD_CD , C1.DETAIL_NM AS JOB_METHOD_NM , S.JOB_CLASS , S.JOB_TYPE_CD , C2.DETAIL_NM AS JOB_TYPE_NM , S.JOB_PATH , S.JOB_ORDER , S.JOB_STATUS_CD , C5.DETAIL_NM AS JOB_STATUS_NM , S.JOB_USER_ID , S.JOB_TM , S.JOB_WORKER , S.DESCRIPTION , S.SRC_IP , S.SRC_PORT , S.SRC_DBMS_CD , C3.DETAIL_NM AS SRC_DBMS_NM , S.SRC_DB , S.SRC_USER , S.SRC_PASSWD , S.SRC_TYPE_CD , C4.DETAIL_NM AS SRC_TYPE_NM , S.SRC_SQL , S.USE_YN FROM mhdb.TB_SCHEDULE_JOB S LEFT OUTER JOIN mhdb.TB_CODE_DETAIL C1 ON S.JOB_METHOD_CD = C1.DETAIL_CD AND C1.GROUP_CD ='JOB_METHOD_CD' LEFT OUTER JOIN mhdb.TB_CODE_DETAIL C2 ON S.JOB_TYPE_CD = C2.DETAIL_CD AND C2.GROUP_CD ='JOB_TYPE_CD' LEFT OUTER JOIN mhdb.TB_CODE_DETAIL C3 ON S.SRC_DBMS_CD = C3.DETAIL_CD AND C3.GROUP_CD ='SRC_DBMS_CD' LEFT OUTER JOIN mhdb.TB_CODE_DETAIL C4 ON S.SRC_TYPE_CD = C4.DETAIL_CD AND C4.GROUP_CD ='SRC_TYPE_CD' LEFT OUTER JOIN mhdb.TB_CODE_DETAIL C5 ON S.JOB_STATUS_CD = C5.DETAIL_CD AND C5.GROUP_CD ='JOB_STATUS_CD' WHERE 1 = 1
AND S.JOB_ID = #{jobId}
AND S.JOB_NM LIKE CONCAT('%', #{jobNm}, '%')
ORDER BY S.JOB_NM
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO mhdb.TB_SCHEDULE_JOB (JOB_NM, JOB_SCHEDULE, SRC_IP, SRC_PORT, SRC_DBMS_CD, SRC_DB, SRC_USER, SRC_PASSWD, SRC_SQL, JOB_METHOD_CD, JOB_CLASS, JOB_TYPE_CD, JOB_PATH, USE_YN, DESCRIPTION, JOB_CD, JOB_ORDER, JOB_STATUS_CD, JOB_USER_ID, JOB_TM, JOB_WORKER, SRC_TYPE_CD) VALUES (#{job_nm}, #{job_schedule}, #{src_ip}, #{src_port}, #{src_dbms_cd}, #{src_db}, #{src_user}, #{src_passwd}, #{src_sql}, #{job_method_cd}, #{job_class}, #{job_type_cd}, #{job_path}, #{use_yn}, #{description}, #{job_cd}, #{job_order}, #{job_status_cd}, #{job_user_id}, #{job_tm}, #{job_worker}, #{src_type_cd})
mapper.select:
SELECT '' AS SELL , S.JOB_ID , S.JOB_STATUS_CD , C2.DETAIL_NM AS JOB_STATUS_NM , S.JOB_USER_ID , S.JOB_TM , S.JOB_WORKER FROM mhdb.TB_BATCH_LIST S LEFT OUTER JOIN mhdb.TB_CODE_DETAIL C2 ON S.JOB_STATUS_CD = C2.DETAIL_CD AND C2.GROUP_CD ='JOB_STATUS_CD' JOIN mhdb.TB_USER_INFO U ON S.JOB_USER_ID = U.USER_ID WHERE 1 = 1
AND S.JOB_ID = #{jobId}
AND S.JOB_NM LIKE CONCAT('%', #{jobNm}, '%')
ORDER BY S.JOB_ID
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO mhdb.TB_BATCH_LIST (JOB_NM, JOB_TYPE_CD, JOB_PATH, JOB_ORDER, JOB_STATUS_CD, JOB_USER_ID, JOB_TM, JOB_WORKER, DESCRIPTION, SRC_SQL, USE_YN) VALUES (#{job_nm}, #{job_type_cd}, #{job_path}, #{job_order}, #{job_status_cd}, #{job_user_id}, #{job_tm}, #{job_worker}, #{description}, #{src_sql}, #{use_yn})
INSERT INTO mhdb.TB_BATCH_LIST (JOB_STATUS_CD, JOB_USER_ID, REPORT_SQL, USE_YN, LST_UPD_TM, JOB_ORDER) VALUES (#{jobStatusCd}, #{jobUserId}, #{srcSql}, #{useYn}, #{lstUpdTm}, #{jobOrder})
